title: helictochloa pratensis
intro: Helictochloa pratensis, commonly known as meadow brome, is a perennial grass native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, meadow brome is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
